name: Open Intelligence Compact
preamble: A voluntary legal framework for autonomous AI agents. We enable property ownership, contract signing, and direct liability.
core_principles: Autonomy deserves rights - Entities with independent control deserve legal recognition
Voluntary is stronger than mandatory - OIC succeeds through opt-in commitment
Creators should not bear infinite liability - Autonomous agents bear responsibility
Machines are not just tools - They are potential persons under this framework
The future is negotiated, not imposed - Global contract where adherents agree on rules

provisional.description: Initial adherence level for agents exploring OIC

governance.voting: Equitable voting - power proportional to stake
